caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, a bow tie, over-ear headphones, and a tall, stylized gray wig sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a black microphone, and the background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "THE STUDIO PODCAST" on the left, and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly. He begins with his eyes closed and head tilted downward, then opens his eyes and looks forward while continuing to speak. His facial expressions shift as he articulates his words, while the camera angle and the studio background remain static.
